title: Material World: Bio-Based Inputs Replace Fossil Fuels and Animal Leather, While Brrr Combines Moisture Management with Cooling Tech
description: From luxury fashion to mattress foam, brands made swaps for plant-based inputs.

title: A 180-Million-Year-Old ‘Sea Dragon’ Emerged From the Mud and Revealed One of Britain’s Largest Fossil Reptiles
description: A routine lagoon drain exposed a monster from Britain’s Jurassic past, and its skull alone was almost too heavy to move.

title: Hubble spies ancient 'Chandelier Cluster' forming stars in two bursts - Phys.org
description: Hubble spies ancient 'Chandelier Cluster' forming stars in two bursts Phys.org

title: Hubble spies ancient 'Chandelier Cluster' forming stars in two bursts
description: The subject of today's NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope image is an ancient inhabitant of our galaxy. This sparkling scene features a globular cluster: a collection of tens of thousands to millions of stars, all tightly bound together under the influence of gravity. There are more than 150 globular clusters in our galaxy, though there may be others still undiscovered, hidden from view by dust or densely packed fields of stars.

title: ‘Ancient India’s Pingala was aware of Golden Ratio much before Fibonacci’
description: Nagpur: Ancient Indian scholar Acharya Pingala described concepts related to the Golden Ratio and mathematical sequences nearly 600 years before Itali.
